name: Anthelmir's Construct
location: Aradros the Awakened in Oathsworn Pit, Urgarlag Chief-bane

bonuses.stat:
Dealing damage with a fully-charged Heavy Attack throws an axe at the enemy, dealing 1572 Physical damage and reducing their Armor by 400 for 5 seconds. This effect can occur once every 10 seconds and scales off the higher of your Weapon or Spell Damage.

The axe drops to the ground after traveling to your target for 5 seconds. Touching the axe reduces the cooldown of this set by 5 seconds.
